methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl was not exposed as an available tool in this isolated worker session, so discovery pivoted to official-domain search and direct HTTP fetches.
Plain HTTP fetch of https://www.uh.cu/robots.txt returned a Yoast robots file with User-agent: * and empty Disallow plus a sitemap index.
The official sitemap index at https://www.uh.cu/sitemap_index.xml was fetched and confirmed WordPress post/page sitemap availability.
The official WordPress search endpoint returned official UH posts including an AI outreach/training article and a 2023 AI workshop article.
The official WordPress search endpoint returned no results for ChatGPT.
The official WordPress search endpoint returned a generic admission notice and the Campus digital page, not an AI-use or data-handling policy for AI tools.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uh.cu inteligencia artificial Universidad de La Habana politica academica
methodsAttempted.notes: Public web search did not surface an official UH AI-use policy, academic-integrity AI policy, or generative-AI guidance page.

artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found AI-related Universidad de La Habana news/status content but no official source stating a binding institutional AI-use policy, ChatGPT policy, academic-integrity rule for AI tools, or AI-specific privacy/data-handling rule.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Inteligencia Artificial en Cuba: Crónica de una gira - Universidad de La Habana
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Un equipo de nueve especialistas de la Universidad de La Habana se embarcó el 10 de agosto en un recorrido sin precedentes por el oriente y centro del país. Su misión: sembrar la semilla del conocimiento sobre Inteligencia Artificial (IA) en cada provincia visitada, adaptándose a las necesidades locales y despertando un entusiasmo que ha superado todas las expectativas.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: A team of nine specialists from Universidad de La Habana began a national tour to share knowledge about Artificial Intelligence in Cuban provinces; the source describes outreach/training activity, not a binding AI-use policy.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Opening paragraph of official UH post

limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claim is not canonical and should not be promoted as evidence of a binding university-wide AI policy without additional official policy text.
